title: Intellia Announces Rolling BLA Submission for Lonvo-Z, CRISPR Therapy for HAE
text: Intellia Therapeutics announced a rolling BLA (Biologics License Application) submission for lonvo-z, its CRISPR-based therapy for hereditary angioedema (HAE). The rolling submission allows Intellia to submit portions of the BLA on an ongoing basis throughout 2026, with completion expected in the second half of 2026. This expedited pathway is supported by the Regenerative Medicine Advanced Therapy (RMAT) designation previously granted by the FDA. If approved, Intellia plans to launch lonvo-z commercially in the first half of 2027. The submission is supported by robust Phase 3 HAELO trial data showing lonvo-z achieved 87% reduction in HAE attacks compared to placebo, with 62% of patients attack-free. Safety data showed only mild to moderate adverse events with no serious safety signals. The rolling BLA approach enables the FDA to review data incrementally and potentially expedite the overall review process.
